title: Senior Software Engineer - Swiggy - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Swiggy - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? Swiggy in Agra offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Swiggy:
Swiggy is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Implement new features based on product requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in REST APIs

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Swiggy!
